Liability & external links

We take care to keep the information on this website accurate and up to date. However, we do not assume liability for correctness, completeness or timeliness. We are not responsible for the content of external websites linked here; responsibility lies solely with the respective operators. At the time of linking, no legal infringements were apparent.

Dispute resolution

Note: The EU Online Dispute Resolution (ODR) platform was discontinued on 20 July 2025. For information on consumer dispute resolution bodies, see: consumer-redress.ec.europa.eu

Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) – Madeira: CACC – Centro de Arbitragem de Conflitos de Consumo da RAM
Rua da Figueira Preta, n.º 10, 3.º andar, 9050-014 Funchal
centroarbitragem.sras@madeira.gov.pt
Livro de Reclamações: www.livroreclamacoes.pt
